testcase.name: testLocalSignupFlow_ValidationFailure

testcase.name: testLocalSignupFlow_Success
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select au1_0.id, au1_0.auth_provider, au1_0.created_at, au1_0.display_name, au1_0.email, au1_0.email_verified, au1_0.enabled, au1_0.password_hash, au1_0.provider_id, au1_0.updated_at, au1_0.verification_token from app_users au1_0 2026-05-24 11:16:50.338 INFO 15623 --- [ main] c.e.auth.controller.AuthController : [traceId=3107d7f2ec061c077793c0e7cffe16b9, spanId=f698dc2c063c19f5] Received REST local signup request for: integration@example.com Hibernate: select au1_0.id from app_users au1_0 where au1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.name from roles r1_0 where r1_0.name=? 2026-05-24 11:16:50.490 WARN 15623 --- [ main] c.example.auth.service.AuthServiceImpl : [traceId=3107d7f2ec061c077793c0e7cffe16b9, spanId=f698dc2c063c19f5] USER role not found in database, creating locally. Hibernate: insert into roles (name, id) values (?, default) Hibernate: insert into app_users (auth_provider, created_at, display_name, email, email_verified, enabled, password_hash, provider_id, updated_at, verification_token, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-05-24 11:16:50.860 INFO 15623 --- [ main] c.example.auth.service.AuthServiceImpl : [traceId=3107d7f2ec061c077793c0e7cffe16b9, spanId=f698dc2c063c19f5] Registered new local user: integration@example.com 2026-05-24 11:16:50.861 INFO 15623 --- [ main] com.example.auth.service.EmailService : [traceId=3107d7f2ec061c077793c0e7cffe16b9, spanId=f698dc2c063c19f5] ---------------------------------------------------------------- 2026-05-24 11:16:50.862 INFO 15623 --- [ main] com.example.auth.service.EmailService : [traceId=3107d7f2ec061c077793c0e7cffe16b9, spanId=f698dc2c063c19f5] REGISTRATION VERIFICATION EMAIL FOR: integration@example.com 2026-05-24 11:16:50.862 INFO 15623 --- [ main] com.example.auth.service.EmailService : [traceId=3107d7f2ec061c077793c0e7cffe16b9, spanId=f698dc2c063c19f5] Click the link to verify your email and activate your account: 2026-05-24 11:16:50.863 INFO 15623 --- [ main] com.example.auth.service.EmailService : [traceId=3107d7f2ec061c077793c0e7cffe16b9, spanId=f698dc2c063c19f5] URL: http://localhost:9000/verify-email?token=204c69fd-fcbb-45ef-aee2-7b251b92718e 2026-05-24 11:16:50.863 INFO 15623 --- [ main] com.example.auth.service.EmailService : [traceId=3107d7f2ec061c077793c0e7cffe16b9, spanId=f698dc2c063c19f5] ---------------------------------------------------------------- Hibernate: select au1_0.id from app_users au1_0 where au1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only
